In this deeply moving StoryCorps conversation, Danny and Annie Perasa share their love story after sixty-three years of marriage. Danny reads one of the daily love notes he leaves for Annie, a tradition he's maintained for decades. When Annie asks how she'll live without his notes, Danny reveals he's hidden notes throughout their home for her future. A tender, heartwarming story about enduring love, devotion, and the power of small gestures that last a lifetime.
